name: HubSpot Outbound Connector
description: Manage contacts, companies, and deals in HubSpot

properties.label: Type
properties.description: Choose the authentication type. Select 'None' if no authentication is necessary

properties.label: Bearer token
properties.tooltip: The access token of your HubSpot private app.

choices.name: Get all contacts of a company

properties.value: =if list contains(["post-api.hsforms.com/submissions"], operationType) then "https://api.hsforms.com" else if list contains(["post-/automation/v2/workflows/{workflowId}/enrollments/contacts"], operationType) then "https://api.hubapi.com" else "https://api.hubspot.com"

properties.label: Next page after object id
properties.tooltip: The id of the object from which to retrieve the next page.

properties.label: Additional properties that should be returned
properties.description: Names of the additional properties as a comma separated list, e.g. city,annualrevenue. Get all contact properties here and learn more about default contact properties here. Leave this empty to get only standard properties.

properties.value: ={"inputs": for id in batchReadIds   return { id:  id  } }

properties.label: Search field
properties.tooltip: The field within the object to perform the search on, e.g. lastname

properties.label: Search value
properties.tooltip: The value to search for, e.g. Smith

properties.label: Company id
properties.tooltip: Company id the contact should be associated with

properties.value: ={"properties": if properties = null then null else properties, "associations": associations}
={"properties": if properties = null then null else properties}

properties.label: Portal id
properties.tooltip: The HubSpot account that the form belongs to. HubSpot account management.

properties.label: Form id
properties.tooltip: The unique ID of the form you're sending data to. HubSpot form GUID.

properties.label: Form fields
properties.tooltip: The values to submit to the form. HubSpot Forms API.

properties.label: Object ids
properties.tooltip: The ids of the objects, e.g. contacts or companies, to add to the list

properties.label: Result variable
properties.tooltip: Name of variable to store the response in

properties.label: Result expression
properties.tooltip: Expression to map the response into process variables

properties.label: Error expression
properties.tooltip: Expression to handle errors. Connector error handling documentation.

properties.label: Retry backoff
properties.tooltip: ISO-8601 duration to wait between retries

steps.name: Contacts
steps.description: Read, create, update, delete and search HubSpot contacts

steps.name: List contacts
steps.description: Retrieve a page of all contacts in HubSpot.

steps.name: Get contact by ID
steps.description: Fetch a single contact from HubSpot by its ID.

steps.name: Batch read contacts
steps.description: Retrieve multiple contacts from HubSpot by their IDs in a single request.

steps.name: Search contacts
steps.description: Search contacts in HubSpot by a property value.

steps.name: Create contact
steps.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot.

steps.name: Update contact
steps.description: Update the properties of an existing contact in HubSpot.

steps.name: Delete contact
steps.description: Delete a contact from HubSpot by its ID.

steps.name: Companies
steps.description: Read, create, delete and search HubSpot companies and manage their contact associations

steps.name: List companies
steps.description: Retrieve a page of all companies in HubSpot.

steps.name: Get company by ID
steps.description: Fetch a single company from HubSpot by its ID.

steps.name: Search companies
steps.description: Search companies in HubSpot by a property value.

steps.name: List company contacts
steps.description: Retrieve all contacts associated with a company in HubSpot.

steps.name: Add contact to company
steps.description: Associate a contact with a company in HubSpot.

steps.name: Remove contact from company
steps.description: Remove the association between a contact and a company in HubSpot.

steps.name: Create company
steps.description: Create a new company in HubSpot.

steps.name: Delete company
steps.description: Delete a company from HubSpot by its ID.

steps.name: Deals
steps.description: Read, search and delete HubSpot deals

steps.name: List deals
steps.description: Retrieve a page of all deals in HubSpot.

steps.name: Get deal by ID
steps.description: Fetch a single deal from HubSpot by its ID.

steps.name: Search deals
steps.description: Search deals in HubSpot by a property value.

steps.name: Delete deal
steps.description: Delete a deal from HubSpot by its ID.

steps.name: Miscellaneous
steps.description: Submit forms, manage list memberships and enroll contacts in workflows

steps.name: Submit form
steps.description: Submit values to a HubSpot form.

steps.name: Add to list
steps.description: Add objects such as contacts or companies to a list in HubSpot.

steps.name: Enroll contact in workflow
steps.description: Enroll a contact into a HubSpot workflow.
